name: claude-theme-marketplace
description: White-label theming for Claude — apply, preview, and build custom themes across the browser, the Claude Code CLI, and Warp.

plugins.name: whitelabel-theme
plugins.description: Apply, preview, list, reset, and build white-label Claude themes. Commands wrap the zero-dependency `claude-whitelabel-themes` CLI (via npx) — theming the claude.ai browser UI, Claude Code terminal colors, and Warp.
